perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with the female creator holding two large transparent bags of snacks in front of a white wall, gesturing excitedly. (2) She brings a bag closer to the camera to show the labels and the contents, which are thin, seasoned rice paper sheets. (3) She opens a bag, pulls out a piece of spicy rice paper, and eats it, showing a surprised and delighted facial expression. (4) The scene cuts to a living room setting where hands are seen playing cards on a coffee table. (5) A group of people is shown sharing the snacks from a large metal bowl; a man in a light-colored shirt takes a bite and reacts with extreme surprise and enthusiasm. (6) The video ends with the creator holding the two bags again, smiling at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music plays immediately. A female voice speaks in a friendly, energetic tone, explaining how she found these snacks on Shopee. (2) Occasional sound effects like plastic bags crinkling and crisp 'crunch' sounds are heard as the creator eats. (3) In the second half, the soundscape changes to a more crowded environment with multiple people laughing and talking. (4) A male voice is heard speaking Korean and Chinese with an exaggerated, surprised tone. (5) The upbeat BGM remains consistent throughout the transitions.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '越式米紙' (Vietnamese Rice Paper) - Hook text identifying the subject. (2) '拖延怪' (Procrastinator) - Decorative text labeling the creator. (3) '我發現!' (I discovered!) - Hook text creating excitement. (4) '好好吃' (So delicious) - Emotional caption during tasting. (5) '冬瓜在這!!!' (Winter melon is here!!!) - Decorative text referring to a person or joke. (6) '超推這個當朋友聚會的小零食' (Highly recommend this as a small snack for friend gatherings) - Functional text concluding the review.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro and solo tasting followed by a group gathering demonstration and final recommendation.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 male main friend, and at least 3 other friends partially visible in the living room scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main creator is a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a grey t-shirt. The secondary main character is a man in a white shirt and jeans with yellow socks.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Initially a plain white wall with minimal furniture; later transitions to a modern home living room with a couch, TV, and coffee table.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Intro -> Personal Taste Test -> Social Proof -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle food review aimed at introducing a specific type of Vietnamese snack to a Mandarin-speaking audience. It combines ASMR-style tasting elements with social gathering footage to demonstrate the product's appeal both as a personal snack and a party food.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically mentions purchasing the product from a known e-commerce platform (Shopee) and provides a detailed taste review with high visual focus on the packaging.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Variety-show style text overlays and high-energy reactions from friends.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The inclusion of a Korean-speaking friend reacting positively to a Vietnamese snack in a Chinese-language vlog highlights a multicultural appeal that increases the video's engagement potential.
